heroHeadline: Trump Issues 'NO MORE MR. NICE GUY' Ultimatum; US Delegation Heads to Islamabad as Ceasefire Expires April 22
heroSubtitle: With the US-Iran ceasefire set to expire April 22 and 'no deal in sight,' Trump sent Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Islamabad for make-or-break talks while simultaneously threatening to 'knock out every single Power Plant and every single Bridge in Iran.' The Strait of Hormuz remains closed after IRGC gunboats fired on Indian-flagged tankers. Iran's Supreme Leader vowed the IRGC navy would inflict 'new defeats' on US and Israeli forces.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-19. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, NPR, CBS News, ABC News, NBC News, PBS NewsHour, Xinhua, The Week India, KPBS, NCRI.
